subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the life and achievements of Rani Abbakka
Identify her qualities like bravery, intelligence, and leadership
Recognize key events and challenges she faced
Develop basic reading comprehension and vocabulary
Learn about historical figures through storytelling

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Rani Abbakka
topics_covered: The time and place of her rule
teaching_strategy: Teacher introduces the story and setting
student_activities: Discuss what makes a leader brave

lesson_plan.title: Qualities and Leadership
topics_covered: Impact on her kingdom and people
teaching_strategy: Teacher explains examples from the text
student_activities: List examples of Rani Abbakka’s leadership
Discuss in pairs which quality was most important

lesson_plan.title: Reflection on Courage
teaching_strategy: Teacher encourages students to share reflections
student_activities: Write a few sentences on one brave act of Rani Abbakka

lesson_plan.title: Creative Activity
topics_covered: Connecting story to imagination and expression
teaching_strategy: Students assign roles and act it out
student_activities: Perform a short role-play showing Rani Abbakka’s courage
Discuss feelings and decisions in the scene

teacher_tip: Encourage students to relate Rani Abbakka’s courage to challenges they face in daily life.
